global.description: The ad features a full canvas background with the EarnPath logo positioned in the top left corner. The main subject includes a prominent text logo at the top center, supported by geometric shapes and a segmented crop in the center. The body text, located at the bottom center, conveys the message 'Your money, clearer Builtfe nd Book now'.
global.visual_style: Modern design with geometric elements and a clean layout

elements.label: EarnPath Logo
elements.description: The logo of the EarnPath app, positioned at the top left corner of the crop.

elements.label: Supporting text
elements.description: Text that supports the main message, positioned below the headline.
elements.text_content: Your money, clearer Builtfe nd Book now

elements.label: EarnPath text logo
elements.description: The logo of the EarnPath app, positioned at the top left corner of the crop.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: Two geometric shapes, an oval and a rectangle, in a blue background, positioned towards the top left of the crop.

elements.label: Segmented crop
elements.description: A segmented crop showing abstract shapes, primarily a rectangle and an oval, with a blue background.

embedding_texts.global_text: Mobile ad for EarnPath Invest emphasizing clarity in investing.
